Election.title: Tennessee capital — Ranked Robin (RR/Condorcet = Nashville)
Election.description: Ranked Robin, 1 winner. The textbook Tennessee example: four cities, voters rank by geographic distance, weighted by population (Memphis 42, Nashville 26, Chattanooga 15, Knoxville 17). Ranked Robin elects the geographic-center consensus, Nashville — the Condorcet winner (beats every rival head-to-head) — while plurality would pick Memphis and RCV-IRV picks Knoxville. First ranked-ballot case created via this script.

logs: Nashville wins round with highest number of wins.
